metadata.title: M. Amary — Fullstack & DevOps Engineer
metadata.description: Fullstack engineer specializing in Spring Boot, AdonisJS, React Native, Next.js, Kubernetes and observability. Available for ambitious projects.

blog.label: 06 / BLOG
blog.heading: Articles
blog.subheading: Technical thoughts on backend, mobile and infrastructure.

hero.pitch: I design scalable backends, build high-performance frontends, deliver mobile applications, and orchestrate the infrastructure that runs them. 🚀

about.label: 01 / ABOUT
about.p1: I design and build production-ready full-stack systems — from backend APIs (Spring Boot, AdonisJS) to web and mobile applications (React, React Native), all the way to the Kubernetes infrastructure that deploys and runs them.
about.p2: Based in Abidjan, I build systems where reliability, performance, and observability are never optional.
about.p3: Every project I deliver is scalable, measurable, and maintainable, designed to survive production and evolve over time.

points: Spring Boot microservices on Kubernetes — 3× faster deployments
React Native app in production for 50,000+ active users
End-to-end observability: OpenTelemetry + Grafana across the full cluster
High-availability REST APIs (99.9%) with AdonisJS — 200,000 requests/day
Monolith → Docker services migration, −40% infrastructure costs
Fintech platform with Next.js + Spring Boot, shipped in 4 months
CI/CD pipelines: release cycle reduced from 2 weeks to 2 days

items.name: KubeMonitor
items.description: Real-time observability dashboard for Kubernetes clusters — centralized alerts, metrics and traces.

items.name: FinPay Mobile
items.description: Mobile payment app for the West African market — 50,000+ active users in production.

items.name: AdonisAuth
items.description: Multi-provider authentication library for AdonisJS — JWT, OAuth2 and 2FA out of the box.

items.name: Portfolio
items.description: This portfolio — optimized Core Web Vitals, Framer Motion animations, consistent design system.
